name: SetPWMThreshold
title: SetPWMThreshold
description: Sets the threshold value for differentiating between high and low levels.
Voltages at the input exceeding this threshold value are evaluated as high level and voltages undershooting it are evaluated as low level.

parameters.name: Voltage value in volts in the range from ...
parameters.description: -32 V to +32 V -40 V to +40 V -60 V to +60 V
